news_items.headline: Mets' Christian Scott answers team's challenge against Phillies: 'I thought it was a good kick in the a--'
news_items.summary: After the Mets' 4-1 win over the Philadelphia Phillies, Christian Scott explained how Andy Green's comments motivated him for this next start.

news_items.headline: Mets talk playing in poor air quality conditions after win over Phillies: 'Felt like I was breathing some metal'
news_items.summary: The Mets and Phillies played through a hazy, smoky atmosphere as the wildfires in Canada affected playing conditions on Thursday.

news_items.headline: Mets reportedly Deadline sellers with very few names off the table
2026 World Series Odds: Yankees Remain Favored AL Squad
news_items.summary: Check out the latest 2026 MLB World Series odds. The Dodgers are the favorites to win again in 2026, but the Yankees aren't that far off.

news_items.headline: Juan Soto injury update: What we know after Mets star exits game against Phillies
news_items.summary: Mets interim manager Andy Green explains why Juan Soto left Thursday's game against the Phillies early. Soto had just played in the All-Star Game.

news_items.headline: Why the Brewers targeted Lance McCullers Jr. and Colton Gordon
news_items.summary: The Brewers jumped the starting pitching trade market, but why for these two guys?

news_items.headline: Purple Row After Dark: Hunter Goodman joins list of big names as a multiple-time Rockies All-Star
news_items.summary: Hunter Goodman is the first multi-time All-Star on the team since 2019.

news_items.headline: Mets best Phillies through the haze
news_items.summary: The Mets did not get the horrible air quality stop them from homering three times in the win.

news_items.headline: St. Louis Cardinals 2027 Schedule Full of Challenges and Opportunities
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals released their 2027 schedule today and it starts with a long road trip, but ends with opportunities. The first 6 games for the 2026 MLB campaign starts with the Cardinals on the road to play the Reds for the first game of a 3-game series in Cincinnati on Thursday, March 25, […]
